title: Roasted Ukrainian Lamb Kebabs
description: A festive and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring lamb loin chops, perfect for springtime celebrations.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, minced garlic, and lemon juice.
Season the lamb loin chops with salt and black pepper.
Dredge the lamb loin chops in the all-purpose flour.
Thread the lamb loin chops onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh rosemary if desired.
